fields.summary: Getting error when submitting an order to Wellvi through Salesforce

content.text: I’m getting an error when I try to e-submit an order to Wellvi pharmacy. This is delaying the patient from getting their medications. Let me know if you need anything else. Thanks!

items.field: Which type of request are you submitting?

content.text: This form is intended to make requests or report issues to the Help Desk staff for assistance, guidance or fixes.
To use this form, enter or select the option that best matches your request or issue. The first question related to the type of request will help determine the fields that you will need to complete.
For the following question, select the option that best matches your needs.
Help with a system, report, or data that affects our Customers or daily operations (e.g. SF Account/Opportunity issues, Patient Portal questions, etc.)
System or software help for internal staff (e.g. Login Issues, System/Software issues, Database Sync Issues etc.)
Request new, replacement or troubleshooting for hardware (e.g. Laptop, Keyboard, Speakers, etc.)
Report suspicious activity that can create a security breach (e.g. lost/stolen hardware, unauthorized access, phishing attempt, etc.)
